title: Fix Hint Button Counter Desync
summary: The hint button counter can desynchronize from actual hint state when levels are reloaded or navigated. Fix the counter tracking to stay in sync with hintsUsed state.

tasks.description: Ensure hint button text always reflects hintsUsed state by using a single updateHintButton() method called from resetHintState, hint click handler, and loadLevel.
acceptance_criteria: Hint button text shows correct count after using hints
Hint button text resets to '💡 Hint' when loading a new level
Hint button disabled state matches actual remaining hints
No desync possible between hintsUsed and button display

testing_focus: Use hints then navigate to another level and back
Use all hints and verify disabled state persists correctly
